promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch for bounded sims evidence-lane and boundary reduction after the bootpack kernel/gating pass.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest role boundaries, evidence transport contract, and workflow pressures for the separate sims source class.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until after the top-level sims boundary contract was reduced into a smaller reusable A2-mid surface.
Deferred because this turn stayed inside the sims intake lane rather than switching back to a non-sims contradiction family.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent sims batch already isolates the evidence-lane patterns, path-role split, and contradiction markers needed for this bounded reduction pass.

candidate_items.name: SEPARATE_SIMS_SOURCE_CLASS_BOUNDARY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest top-level boundary rule from the parent batch without collapsing sims docs, runner scripts, and evidence packs into one intake class.

candidate_items.why_candidate: Captures the cleanest role-separated sims outer pattern while preserving the difference between structural mapping, execution guidance, and transport payloads.

candidate_items.name: HASH_ANCHORED_SIM_EVIDENCE_TRANSPORT_CONTRACT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Isolates the parent batch's strongest admissibility contract in a smaller reusable sims-specific evidence surface.

candidate_items.name: SHARDED_FAILURE_ISOLATION_AND_NEGATIVE_CONTROL_DISCIPLINE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest family-agnostic engineering discipline from the parent batch while keeping workflow claims separate from proof claims.

candidate_items.name: SIMPY_HARNESS_VS_SIMSON_RESULT_ROOT_SPLIT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns loose top-level wording into a sharper path-role split that later runner/result batches can reuse.

quarantined_items.name: FILENAME_AND_RUNBOOK_THEORY_OVERREACH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Theory-facing interpretation in filename-derived maps and engineering workflow notes should not be promoted without narrower runner/result evidence.

quarantined_items.name: PARTIAL_EVIDENCE_PACK_COVERAGE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly shows a gap between visible result files and present evidence-pack coverage.

quarantined_items.name: LEADING_SPACE_AND_CACHE_HYGIENE_RISK
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch surfaces executable-facing path and cache hygiene problems that matter operationally but are not reusable evidence-lane patterns.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest reusable sims evidence-lane and boundary patterns from the parent batch.
They keep source lineage explicit while avoiding a fresh raw-doc pass through the sims corpus.
They preserve the useful role separation without collapsing theory notes, workflow guidance, and evidence payloads into one story.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain unresolved theory overlay, evidence incompleteness, or executable hygiene residue rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong as a boundary map, but not as proof of family behavior or full corpus coverage.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Kept the pass bounded to the top-level sims docs rather than jumping directly into raw runner/result rereads.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this sims evidence-lane reduction pass.
